exercises.title: Class Group Action Simulator
exercises.description: Simulate the commutative class group action.
exercises.task: Implement a simplified class group action and verify commutativity.
exercises.solution:
class ClassGroupAction:
    def __init__(self, primes: list):
        self.primes = primes
        self.j0 = 1728
    
    def act(self, j: int, exponents: list) -> int:
        result = j
        for i, e in enumerate(exponents):
            result = (result + self.primes[i] * e * 137) % 100000
        return result
    
    def verify_commutativity(self, exp_a: list, exp_b: list) -> bool:
        # [a]([b](j0))
        j_b = self.act(self.j0, exp_b)
        j_ab = self.act(j_b, exp_a)
        # [b]([a](j0))
        j_a = self.act(self.j0, exp_a)
        j_ba = self.act(j_a, exp_b)
        return j_ab == j_ba
